description: pack of 3 women's HeatGuard thermal socks from RJM. These thermal socks offer 4 times more insulation than regular cotton. Their unique construction means that heat is trapped in the fibres to keep your feet cosy when the outside temperature drops. Made from 90% acrylic and 10% nylon yarn. Please note that as black elastic has been used on all of these socks (except for the cream one) it is visible when worn around the top edge
